name: brainstormer-codex
description: Read approved Brainstormer sessions in Codex through the Brainstormer MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Read one approved Brainstormer session from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Brainstormer Codex connects Codex to Brainstormer through a read-only OAuth MCP server. Codex can inspect the single Brainstormer session the user approves, summarize nodes and tasks, and search session context without creating or changing Brainstormer data.
defaultPrompt: Find Brainstormer nodes about this topic.
